profiles.mandate_summary: Grow long-term capital while preserving flexibility for known near-term cash needs.

financial_objectives.liquidity_needs: Keep meaningful cash available within 6 months.

risk_guardrails.stress_response: Hold first and only add risk if conviction remains intact.

investment_constraints.constraints: Avoid gambling businesses and highly speculative single-name exposure.
investment_constraints.concentration: Keep single-name exposure around 15% when possible.

interaction_model.review_cadence: Review quarterly and after major life or market changes.

contextual_rules.rule_text: Prefer preserving liquid reserve before adding new high-volatility exposure when near-term cash needs exist.

long_term_memories.summary: User wants growth but dislikes deep drawdowns that interrupt long-term plans.

short_term_memories.summary: User may need roughly 10000 dollars inside 6 months.

profiles.persona_markdown:
# Primary Growth Risk Profile

Long-term growth with explicit liquidity and downside guardrails.
